title: Mani
writer: Per Buckhøj, Jens Henriksen, Asger Jerrild
actors: Ib Schønberg, Maria Garland, Johannes Meyer
plot: In a restaurant Henrik Verle meets Dr. Erik Menkel, just released from prison after being sentenced to 6 years for the murder of Prof. Victor Smidt. Over time Henrik Verle gains Menkel's trust continuing Smidt's research.
